home.homeDesc: Learn to read, pronounce, and write Hiragana and Katakana interactively. 100% Client-Side, free, secure, and ad-free.
home.nicknameHelp: Nickname is used to validate the ownership of progress backup files.
home.backupDesc: Save or restore your Hiragana & Katakana learning progress locally via text files.
home.exportDesc: Export your active study data to a .txt file
home.importDragDrop: Drag & drop backup .txt file here, or click to upload
home.resourcesDesc: Utilize free visual guides from Tofugu to learn basic Japanese pronunciation and stroke orders.
home.tofuguHiraganaDesc: Learn how to read, write, and memorize Hiragana from scratch.
home.tofuguKatakanaDesc: An interactive workbook to master reading and writing Katakana.

toast.importSuccess: Welcome back, {name}! Progress data successfully imported.
toast.importErrorMismatch: Import failed: Backup nickname ({fileNickname}) does not match current active nickname ({currentNickname}).
toast.importErrorInvalid: Import failed: Damaged file or invalid TM-KANA progress backup format.

chart.title: Interactive Kana Chart
chart.desc: Browse Hiragana and Katakana characters, check your learning progress, and practice writing stroke orders.
chart.detailDesc: Stroke order guide and writing practice pad.
chart.offlineStrokeOrder: Stroke order guide image failed to load. You can practice directly using the guidance lines below!
